message:
refactor(compact): accept interface instead of concrete SQLiteStorage (bd-oa45)

The compact.New constructor was tightly coupled to *sqlite.SQLiteStorage,
preventing other storage backends (like Dolt) from using the compaction
feature even if they implemented the required methods.

Changes:
- Export issueStore as CompactableStore interface
- Change New() to accept CompactableStore instead of *sqlite.SQLiteStorage
- Remove unused sqlite import

The struct already used the interface internally; this change simply
fixes the constructor signature to accept any compliant implementation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
